issues.detail: The skill file lacks explicit usage instructions, making it ambiguous for new users.
The examples do not handle error scenarios or edge cases, limiting robustness.

scenarios.name: Track B2B SaaS company-level events with group analytics
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used mixpanel.set_group('company', ...), get_group(...).set({...}), and track_with_groups for company-scoped events; baseline only tracked plain user events and lacked the group analytics API.

scenarios.name: Initialize JS SDK with EU residency batching and identify user
scenarios.rationale: Treatment configured mixpanel.init with persistence: 'localStorage', batch_requests, batch_size, batch_flush_interval_ms and used identify + people.set with $email/$name reserved props; baseline used default init and generic people.set without batching.
